# dual-prefix-collapse

Diverging controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.* collapse with warn

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/repo-server-client/dual-prefix-collapse` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "30"
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer:
    client:
      timeout: 1m0s
      tlsEnabled: true
  server: {}
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  controller.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
  server.repo.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.repo.server.timeout.seconds: "60"
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.plaintext
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
- direction: cm->cr
  key: controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds
  message: controller and server values differ ("60" vs "30"); using controller value
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: controller.repo.server.timeout.seconds
  message: writing same value to controller.repo.server.* and server.repo.server.*
    keys
  severity: warn
```
